exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
from docx import Document

path = Path("informe.docx")
doc = Document()
doc.add_heading("Informe sintético", 0)
doc.add_heading("Resumen", 1)
doc.add_paragraph("Muestra reconciliada: n=40")
doc.save(path)
opened = Document(path)
text = " | ".join(p.text for p in opened.paragraphs if p.text)
print("n=" in text, "Resumen" in text, "|", path.exists(), bool(text))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S21-T2-A-E1: reescribí el TODO del starter del paquete para cumplir el contrato Pass de la instruction, usando solo fixtures y APIs del slim packet (theory/iDo de la sección 21). exercises.code:
from docx import Document

levels = [("Resumen", 1), ("Método", 2), ("Anexos", 1)]
doc = Document()
for text, level in levels:
    doc.add_heading(text, level)
doc.save("estructura.docx")
opened = Document("estructura.docx")
styles = [p.style.name for p in opened.paragraphs if p.text]
print(styles.count("Heading 1"), "|", styles)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S21-T2-A-E2: reescribí el TODO del starter del paquete para cumplir el contrato Pass de la instruction, usando solo fixtures y APIs del slim packet (theory/iDo de la sección 21). Cierre: print(styles.count("Heading 1"), "|", styles)

exercises.code:
from docx import Document

metrics = [("Ticket mediano", "28.0"), ("Reclamos", "—")]
doc = Document()
doc.add_heading("Auditoría", 1)
table = doc.add_table(rows=1, cols=2)
table.rows[0].cells[0].text = "Métrica"
table.rows[0].cells[1].text = "Valor"
for name, value in metrics:
    cells = table.add_row().cells
    cells[0].text, cells[1].text = name, value
doc.save("auditoria.docx")
opened = Document("auditoria.docx")
rows = [[c.text for c in r.cells] for r in opened.tables[0].rows][1:]
print(rows[0], "|", rows[1], rows == [list(m) for m in metrics])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S21-T2-A-E3: reescribí el TODO del starter del paquete para cumplir el contrato Pass de la instruction, usando solo fixtures y APIs del slim packet (theory/iDo de la sección 21). Cierre: print(rows[0], "|", rows[1], rows == [list(m) for m in metrics])

path = Path("digital.pdf")

print(pdf.exists(), png.exists())

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
from pypdf import PdfReader
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas

png, pdf = Path("scan.png"), Path("scan.pdf")
image = Image.new("RGB", (500, 120), "white")
ImageDraw.Draw(image).text((20, 40), "Documento sintetico n=17", fill="black")
image.save(png)
c = canvas.Canvas(str(pdf), pagesize=(500, 120))
c.drawImage(str(png), 0, 0, width=500, height=120)
c.save()
text = PdfReader(pdf).pages[0].extract_text() or ""
print(png.exists(), pdf.exists(), "|", {"needs_ocr": len(text.strip()) == 0, "n_chars": len(text.strip())})
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S21-T2-B-E3: reescribí el TODO del starter del paquete para cumplir el contrato Pass de la instruction, usando solo fixtures y APIs del slim packet (theory/iDo de la sección 21). Cierre: print(png.exists(), pdf.exists(), "|", {"needs_ocr": len(text.strip()) == 0, "n_chars": len(text.str
